identity: Human WOMAN (female), about 26 years old, long wavy auburn-red hair falling to the shoulders, warm brown eyes, calm confident adult face.
outfit: Deep-red hooded robe with a yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, gold trim along the hood and front seam. Hood worn up.
weapons: No staff — uses bare hands. A plume of orange-yellow fire always flickers in the left palm when conjured.
attackStyle: East-facing. Left hand thrust forward hurling a large orange fireball, right hand drawn back, robe billowing.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both palms held forward cupping a swirling orange-yellow flame, hood up, serene face.
blockStyle: East-facing. Both arms crossed in front of the chest, flames flaring protectively around her.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, flames extinguished, head bowed, hood slumped, hands limp in her lap.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Left hand held out to the side with a small flickering flame in the palm, right hand at her side, hood up.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Deep-red hood with gold trim, long wavy auburn-red hair, warm brown eyes, yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, a small plume of fire in the left palm.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human WOMAN (female), about 26 years old, long wavy auburn-red hair falling to the shoulders, warm brown eyes, calm confident adult face.

OUTFIT: Deep-red hooded robe with a yellow-gold flame emblem on the chest, gold trim along the hood and front seam. Hood worn up.

WEAPONS: No staff — uses bare hands. A plume of orange-yellow fire always flickers in the left palm when conjured.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

AGE & PROPORTIONS (non-negotiable): character is a fully-grown adult about 28-32 years old with standard heroic adult proportions (approximately 6 feet / 180 cm tall). NOT a child, NOT a teenager, NOT elderly, NOT a graybeard wizard.

SCALE (non-negotiable): full-body figure occupies approximately 85% of the 256x256 canvas height, feet near the bottom edge, head near the top — consistent scale with other adult humanoid characters in the same sprite set.

LIGHTING (non-negotiable): bright evenly-lit pixel art, NOT silhouetted, NOT overly dark, NOT cast in deep shadow. All colors, facial features, and outfit details must be fully readable.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.
